paperTitle: Discrete Speech Tokenizers for Zero-Shot Text-to-Speech
content:
## Discrete Speech Tokenizers for Zero-Shot Text-to-Speech

### Core Concept

Enable zero-shot TTS by learning discrete speech tokens without speaker-specific training

### Implementation

Implement the key technique by:
1. Processing inputs with appropriate encoders
2. Applying the core algorithm
3. Generating outputs and evaluating results

This skill provides foundations for Enable zero-shot TTS by learning discrete speech tokens without speaker-specific training.

### When to Use

- Goal aligns with technique purpose
- Input data format matches requirements
- Evaluation metrics available

### When NOT to Use

- Requires domain-specific customization
- Data format incompatible
- Real-time constraints extreme
